zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf II von Habsburg於1170年7月15日出生在瑞士阿高哈布斯堡時，他的父親Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg32歲，母親Ita von Pfullendorf29歲。他於大約1187年與Agnes von Staufen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1232年4月10日在瑞士阿高姆利享年61歲，埋葬在瑞士阿高姆利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolf II von Habsburg于1170年7月15日出生在瑞士阿高哈布斯堡时，他的父亲Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg32岁，母亲Ita von Pfullendorf29岁。他于大约1187年与Agnes von Staufen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1232年4月10日在瑞士阿高姆利享年61岁，埋葬在瑞士阿高姆利。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf II von Habsburg was born on 15 July 1170, in Habsburg, Aargau, Switzerland, his father, Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg, was 32 and his mother, Ita von Pfullendorf, was 29. He married Agnes von Staufen about 1187. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 April 1232, in Muri, Aargau, Switzerland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Muri, Aargau, Switzerland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf II von Habsburg est né le 15 juillet 1170, à Habsburg, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ita von Pfullendorf, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes von Staufen environ 1187. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1232, à Muri, Argovie, Suisse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Muri, Argovie, Suisse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rudolf II von Habsburg am 15. Juli 1170 in Habsburg, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg 32 und seine Mutter Ita von Pfullendorf 29. Er hat um 1187 Agnes von Staufen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. April 1232 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Muri, Aargau, Schweiz und wurde in Muri, Aargau, Schweiz begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf II von Habsburg è nato il il 15 luglio 1170 nel Habsburg, Argovia, Svizzera, il suo padre, Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ita von Pfullendorf, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agnes von Staufen circa 1187. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1232, nel Muri, Argovia, Svizzera, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Muri, Argovia, Svizzera.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudolf II von Habsburgが1170年7月15日にスイスアールガウハブスブルグで生まれた時，父Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburgは32歳，母Ita von Pfullendorfは29歳であった。約1187年にAgnes von Staufenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1232年4月10日にスイスアールガウムリで61歳で死去し，スイスアールガウムリにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf II von Habsburg(이)가 1170년 7월 15일 스위스 아아르가 하브스버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ita von Pfullendorf(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1187년 Agnes von Staufen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1232년 4월 10일 스위스 아아르가 머이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스위스 아아르가 머이에 묻혔다.

mn.15 July 1170–10 April 1232: 1170 оны Долоодугаар сарын 15–1232 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 10

pt.15 July 1170–10 April 1232: 15 de julho de 1170–10 de abril de 1232
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf II von Habsburg nasceu em 15 de julho de 1170, em Habsburg, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ita von Pfullendorf, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes von Staufen aproximadamente 1187. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1232, em Muri, Aargau, Suiça, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Muri, Aargau, Suiça.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf II von Habsburg родился 15 июля 1170 г. в местности хабсбург, ааргау, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ita von Pfullendorf, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes von Staufen около 1187 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 апреля 1232 г. в местности мури, ааргау, Швейцария в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности мури, ааргау, Швейцария.

es.15 July 1170–10 April 1232: 15 de julio de 1170–10 de abril de 1232
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rudolf II von Habsburg nació el 15 de julio de 1170, en Habsburg, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Albert bzw. Albrecht III., der Reiche, Graf von Habsburg, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ita von Pfullendorf, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agnes von Staufen aproximadamente 1187. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1232, en Muri, Aargau, Suiza, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Muri, Aargau, Suiza.

th.15 July 1170–10 April 1232: 15 กรกฎาคม 1170–10 เมษายน 1232
